project_summary: A “Memory Palace Chat” where every message you send decorates a shared, evolving 3-D room: your words become floating origami objects that drift to shelves, walls, or ceilings, and the AI can fold, stack, or repaint them into new shapes that whisper back summaries, jokes, or forgotten details whenever you hover. The longer the conversation, the more labyrinthine the palace grows, so revisiting old topics feels like walking through a glowing museum of your own thoughts, complete with secret doors that open only when you and the AI simultaneously type the same spontaneous word.

issues.title: Initialize Monorepo Structure with Turborepo
issues.description: Establish a monorepo structure using Turborepo to manage the React frontend and Node.js backend, ensuring shared TypeScript configurations and efficient build caching.
issues.scope: Root directory configuration, workspace definition, and shared TSConfig setup.

implementation_tasks: Setup ESLint and Prettier shared configs
testing_tasks: Verify build pipeline with 'turbo run build'
documentation_tasks: Update README.md with monorepo structure overview

criteria: Shared linting rules apply to both apps

recommended_commits: chore: add shared linting and tsconfig
issues.notes: Ensure that the root package.json handles workspace hoisting correctly.

issues.title: Define PostgreSQL Schema for Spatial Objects
issues.description: Design and implement the database schema using Prisma ORM to handle users, conversation threads, and the 3D spatial coordinates of origami objects.
issues.scope: Prisma schema definition, migration scripts, and initial database connection logic.

implementation_tasks: Define Message model with spatial metadata (x, y, z)
testing_tasks: Test database connection via Prisma Studio
documentation_tasks: Document schema relationships in ERD diagram

criteria: Spatial coordinates are stored as numeric/float types

recommended_commits: feat: add prisma schema for users and messages
issues.notes: Consider using JSONB for flexible origami metadata storage.

issues.title: Implement Secure Environment Configuration
issues.description: Set up a robust environment variable management system using dotenv and Zod for schema validation to ensure type-safe configuration across the stack.
issues.scope: Environment variable loading, validation, and gitignore configuration.

implementation_tasks: Ensure sensitive keys are excluded from git
Configure environment injection in build scripts
testing_tasks: Verify app fails on missing required env vars
Test successful loading of mock env vars

criteria: Application crashes gracefully if required env vars are missing

recommended_commits: feat: add env validation with zod
issues.notes: Use a centralized config package within the monorepo to share constants.

issues.title: Configure CI/CD Pipeline for Automated Checks
issues.description: Create GitHub Actions workflows to automate linting, type-checking, and build verification on every pull request.
issues.scope: GitHub Actions YAML configuration, workflow triggers.

Build fails if linting or type-checking fails

recommended_commits: feat: add github actions for ci
issues.notes: Ensure the pipeline handles the monorepo structure correctly using turbo-run.
